title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 109.195 - Public records of ownership or security interest not subject to inspection or copying
text:
109.195.  Public records of ownership or security interest not subject to inspection or copying. — Records concerning the ownership of, or security interest in, registered public obligations are not subject to inspection or copying under any law of this state relating to the right of the public to inspect or copy public records, notwithstanding any law to the contrary.
(L. 1985 H.B. 791)
